title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Install GitHub using devtools: load package:
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("WalrusQuant/pllr") library(pllr)

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: pllr wraps Premier Lacrosse League (PLL) stats API returns results tibbles snake_case column names. package provides six functions covering standings, player statistics, game events, draft, free agency. column names automatically converted API’s camelCase snake_case.

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Returns team standings given season. Set champ_series = TRUE Champ Series standings FALSE regular season. Key columns: team_id, full_name, location, seed, wins, losses, ties, scores, scores_against, score_diff, conference, conference_seed.
code: standings <- pll_standings(year = 2025, champ_series = TRUE) # # A tibble: 14 × 19 # # team_id  full_name  location  wins  losses  ties  scores  scores_against ...

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Returns game schedule results season. Optionally include Champ Series WLL events. Home team columns prefixed home_ away team columns away_ (e.g., home_full_name, away_score, away_url_logo).
code: events <- pll_events(year = 2025, include_cs = TRUE, include_wll = TRUE) # # A tibble: ~80 × 64 # # id  event_id  league  start_time  venue  broadcaster  home_full_name  away_full_name ...

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Returns per-player season statistics. Use season_segment choose "champseries" "regular". Player identity columns include official_id, first_name, last_name, slug, jersey_num, position, experience. Team columns prefixed team_ (e.g., team_full_name, team_location_code). Stat columns include goals, assists, points, shots, shot_pct, saves, save_pct, faceoffs_won, faceoff_pct, ground_balls, turnovers, caused_turnovers, gaa, plus_minus, many .
code: stats <- pll_player_stats(year = 2025, season_segment = "champseries") # # A tibble: ~200 × 70 # # official_id  first_name  last_name  position  goals  assists  points ...

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Returns free agent data given year. Columns include name, first_name, last_name, slug, age, experience, position, status, official_id, new_contract_status, new_team_id, prev_team_id, thirty_percent_threshold_met. Note: pll_free_agents() uses GraphQL API endpoint; functions use REST API.
code: free_agents <- pll_free_agents(year = 2026) # # A tibble: ~50 × 14 # # name  position  age  prev_team_id  new_team_id  new_contract_status ...

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Returns official draft pick order given year league. Pick-specific columns prefixed pick_: pick_player_name, pick_college, pick_position, pick_player_id. Pick columns NA unfilled slots.
code: draft <- pll_draft_order(year = 2025, league = "PLL") # # A tibble: ~60 × 11 # # id  year  round  round_pick  overall_pick  team_id  pick_player_name ...

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Returns analyst mock draft rankings (official picks) given year. Columns include id, year, analyst_name, player_name, image_url, position, college, college_logo, overall_rank, position_rank, change, analysis, league. Use pll_draft_order() official selections draft occurred.
code: predictions <- pll_draft_predictions(year = 2026) # # A tibble: ~30 × 13 # # id  year  analyst_name  player_name  position  college  overall_rank  analysis ...

title: Getting Started with pllr
text: Column naming: returned tibble columns use snake_case. underlying API uses camelCase; package converts names automatically. Data availability: Season data (standings, player stats, events) available season played. Querying future -progress season may return partial empty results. Draft predictions vs. draft order: pll_draft_predictions() returns analyst mock draft rankings. Use pll_draft_order() official draft selections.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Adam Wickwire. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Wickwire (2026). pllr: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client. R package version 0.1.0, https://walrusquant.github.io/pllr/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {pllr: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client},   author = {Adam Wickwire},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://walrusquant.github.io/pllr/}, }

what: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: R package wraps Premier Lacrosse League (PLL) stats API returns results tibbles snake_case column names.

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: GitHub: local clone:
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("WalrusQuant/pllr") devtools::install("path/to/pllr")

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
code: library(pllr)  # Team standings (Champ Series, 2025) standings <- pll_standings(year = 2025, champ_series = TRUE) # # A tibble: 14 × 19 # # team_id  full_name         location  wins losses ties scores scores_against ...  # Player season stats stats <- pll_player_stats(year = 2025, season_segment = "champseries") # # A tibble: ~200 × 70 # # official_id  first_name  last_name  position  goals  assists  points ...  # Game schedule and results events <- pll_events(year = 2025, include_cs = TRUE, include_wll = TRUE) # # A tibble: ~80 × 64 # # id  event_id  start_time  venue  broadcaster  home_full_name  away_full_name  home_score  away_score ...  # Draft pick order draft <- pll_draft_order(year = 2025, league = "PLL") # # A tibble: ~60 × 11 # # id  year  round  round_pick  overall_pick  team_id  pick_player_name ...  # Mock draft rankings / predictions predictions <- pll_draft_predictions(year = 2026) # # A tibble: ~30 × 13 # # id  year  analyst_name  player_name  position  college  overall_rank  analysis ...  # Free agents free_agents <- pll_free_agents(year = 2026) # # A tibble: ~50 × 14 # # name  position  age  prev_team_id  new_team_id  new_contract_status ...

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Returns team standings specified season. Returns: tibble one row per team. Key columns: team_id, full_name, location, location_code, url_logo, seed, wins, losses, ties, scores, scores_against, score_diff, conference_wins, conference_losses, conference_ties, conference_scores, conference_scores_against, conference, conference_seed.

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Returns player statistics specified season segment. Returns: tibble one row per player approximately 70 snake_case columns. Player identity columns: official_id, first_name, last_name, slug, jersey_num, position, position_name, experience. Team columns prefixed team_ (e.g., team_full_name, team_location_code). Stat columns include goals, assists, points, shots, shot_pct, saves, save_pct, faceoffs_won, faceoff_pct, ground_balls, turnovers, caused_turnovers, gaa, plus_minus, many .

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Returns game schedule results specified season. Returns: tibble one row per game event. Top-level columns include id, event_id, league, season_segment, start_time, week, year, game_number, venue, venue_location, broadcaster, event_status, game_status, home_score, visitor_score. Home team columns prefixed home_ away team columns away_ (e.g., home_full_name, away_full_name, home_url_logo).

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Returns draft pick order specified year league. Returns: tibble one row per draft slot. Columns: id, year, round, round_pick, overall_pick, team_id, league. Pick-specific columns prefixed pick_: pick_player_name, pick_college, pick_position, pick_player_id. Pick columns NA unfilled slots.

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Returns analyst mock draft rankings specified year. Returns: tibble one row per predicted pick. Columns: id, year, analyst_name, player_name, image_url, position, college, college_logo, overall_rank, position_rank, change, analysis, league.

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Returns free agent data specified year. Returns: tibble one row per free agent. Columns: name, first_name, last_name, slug, profile_url, age, experience, position, status, official_id, new_contract_status, new_team_id, prev_team_id, thirty_percent_threshold_met.

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: Data availability: Season data (standings, player stats, events) available season played. Querying future -progress season may return partial empty results. Column naming: returned tibble columns use snake_case. underlying API uses camelCase; package converts names automatically. Draft predictions: pll_draft_predictions() returns analyst mock draft rankings, official picks. Use pll_draft_order() official selections. Free agents: pll_free_agents() uses GraphQL API endpoint; functions use REST API.

title: Premier Lacrosse League Stats API Client
text: MIT

title: Get PLL Draft Order — pll_draft_order
text: Retrieves official draft pick order given PLL draft year league. Returns one row per draft slot team ownership , draft occurred, player selected slot.

title: Get PLL Draft Order — pll_draft_order
code: pll_draft_order(year = 2025, league = "PLL")

title: Get PLL Draft Order — pll_draft_order
text: year Integer. Draft year. Default 2025. league Character. League identifier. Default "PLL".

title: Get PLL Draft Order — pll_draft_order
text: tibble one row per draft slot 11 columns: id Character. Unique identifier draft slot record. year Integer. Draft year. round Integer. Draft round number. round_pick Integer. Pick number within round. overall_pick Integer. Overall pick number across rounds. team_id Character. ID team holding pick. league Character. League identifier. pick_player_name Character. Name drafted player,     NA slot yet filled. pick_college Character. Player's college, NA unfilled. pick_position Character. Player's position, NA unfilled. pick_player_id Character. Player ID, NA unfilled.

title: Get PLL Draft Order — pll_draft_order
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Official 2025 PLL draft order with picks filled in pll_draft_order()  # 2026 draft order (pick columns may be NA before the draft) pll_draft_order(year = 2026, league = "PLL") } # }

title: Get PLL Draft Predictions — pll_draft_predictions
text: Retrieves analyst mock draft rankings predictions given PLL draft year. analyst opinions, official picks. official draft selections use pll_draft_order.

title: Get PLL Draft Predictions — pll_draft_predictions
code: pll_draft_predictions(year = 2026)

title: Get PLL Draft Predictions — pll_draft_predictions
text: year Integer. Draft year retrieve predictions .     Default 2026.

title: Get PLL Draft Predictions — pll_draft_predictions
text: tibble one row per predicted pick 13 columns: id Character. Unique record ID. year Integer. Draft year. analyst_name Character. Name analyst source. player_name Character. Predicted player name. image_url Character. URL player's image. position Character. Player position. college Character. Player's college. college_logo Character. URL college's logo. overall_rank Integer. Analyst's overall draft ranking player. position_rank Integer. Ranking within player's position group. change Integer. Change rank since last update. analysis Character. Analyst write-scouting notes. league Character. League identifier.

title: Get PLL Draft Predictions — pll_draft_predictions
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Mock draft predictions for 2026 (default) pll_draft_predictions()  # Predictions for a past draft year pll_draft_predictions(year = 2025) } # }

title: Get PLL Events (Games) — pll_events
text: Retrieves scheduled completed game events given PLL season year. Returns one row per game event metadata, scores, venue info, home/away team details.

title: Get PLL Events (Games) — pll_events
code: pll_events(year = 2025, include_cs = TRUE, include_wll = TRUE)

title: Get PLL Events (Games) — pll_events
text: year Integer. Season year. Default 2025. Season data     available years season started completed. include_cs Logical. TRUE (default), include Champ Series     events results. include_wll Logical. TRUE (default), include WLL     (Women's Lacrosse League) events results.

title: Get PLL Events (Games) — pll_events
text: tibble one row per game event. Top-level columns include: id Character. Internal event ID. event_id Character. Public-facing event ID. league Character. League identifier (e.g., "PLL"). season_segment Character. Season segment identifier. start_time Character. Event start time (ISO 8601 string). week Integer. Week number within season. year Integer. Season year. game_number Integer. Game number within season. venue Character. Venue name. venue_location Character. Venue city/location. broadcaster Character. Broadcast network streaming platform. event_status Character. Event status (e.g., "final",     "scheduled"). game_status Character. Detailed game status string. home_score Integer. Home team final score. visitor_score Integer. Visiting team final score. Home team columns prefixed home_ away team columns away_. sets contain: official_id, year, url_logo, full_name, location, location_code, league, conference, team_wins, team_losses, team_ties, seed, team_color, background_color.

title: Get PLL Events (Games) — pll_events
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # All events for the default year (includes Champ Series and WLL) pll_events()  # PLL-only regular season events for 2024 pll_events(year = 2024, include_cs = FALSE, include_wll = FALSE) } # }

title: Get PLL Free Agents — pll_free_agents
text: Retrieves free agent data given PLL year via GraphQL API. Returns one row per free agent player identity, team transition info, contract status.

title: Get PLL Free Agents — pll_free_agents
code: pll_free_agents(year = 2026)

title: Get PLL Free Agents — pll_free_agents
text: year Integer. Year query. Default 2026. Free agent data     may sparse unavailable offseason period given     year.

title: Get PLL Free Agents — pll_free_agents
text: tibble one row per free agent 14 snake_case columns: name Character. Full player name. first_name Character. Player first name. last_name Character. Player last name. slug Character. URL-friendly player slug. profile_url Character. URL player's profile page. age Integer. Player age. experience Integer. Years professional experience. position Character. Player position abbreviation. status Character. Player roster status. official_id Character. Unique official player ID. new_contract_status Character. Status player's new contract     (e.g., "signed", "unsigned"). new_team_id Character. Team ID player's new team,     NA unsigned. prev_team_id Character. Team ID player's previous team. thirty_percent_threshold_met Logical. Whether player met     30% salary threshold rule.

title: Get PLL Free Agents — pll_free_agents
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Free agents for the default year (2026) pll_free_agents()  # Free agents from a past offseason pll_free_agents(year = 2025) } # }

what: Get PLL Player Season Stats — pll_player_stats
title: Get PLL Player Season Stats — pll_player_stats
text: Retrieves player statistics given PLL season year segment. Returns one row per player identity fields, team info, approximately 56 individual stat columns, snake_case.

title: Get PLL Player Season Stats — pll_player_stats
code: pll_player_stats(year = 2025, season_segment = "champseries")

title: Get PLL Player Season Stats — pll_player_stats
text: year Integer. Season year. Default 2025. Season data     available years season started completed. season_segment Character. Season segment identifier. Use     "champseries" (default) Champ Series stats "regular"     regular season stats.

title: Get PLL Player Season Stats — pll_player_stats
text: tibble one row per player approximately 70 snake_case columns. Player identity columns: official_id, first_name, last_name, slug, profile_url, jersey_num, position, position_name, experience. Team columns (prefixed team_): team_official_id, team_full_name, team_location, team_location_code, team_url_logo. Selected stat columns: goals Integer. Total goals scored. two_point_goals Integer. Two-point goals scored. one_point_goals Integer. One-point goals scored. assists Integer. Total assists. points Integer. Total points (goals + assists). shots Integer. Total shots taken. shot_pct Numeric. Shot percentage. shots_on_goal Integer. Shots goal. saves Integer. Goalie saves. save_pct Numeric. Goalie save percentage. goals_against Integer. Goals allowed goalie. gaa Numeric. Goals average. faceoffs_won Integer. Faceoffs won. faceoffs_lost Integer. Faceoffs lost. faceoffs Integer. Total faceoffs taken. faceoff_pct Numeric. Faceoff win percentage. ground_balls Integer. Ground balls. turnovers Integer. Turnovers. caused_turnovers Integer. Caused turnovers. plus_minus Integer. Plus/minus rating. games_played Integer. Games played. games_started Integer. Games started. Additional stat columns: scoring_points, two_point_shot_pct, two_point_shots, two_point_shots_on_goal, two_point_shots_on_goal_pct, scores_against, saa, two_point_goals_against, num_penalties, pim, pim_value, power_play_goals, power_play_shots, short_handed_goals, short_handed_shots, short_handed_goals_against, power_play_goals_against, tof, goalie_wins, goalie_losses, goalie_ties, two_pt_gaa, fo_record, shot_turnovers, touches, total_passes, unassisted_goals, assisted_goals, pass_rate, shot_rate, goal_rate, assist_rate, turnover_rate.

title: Get PLL Player Season Stats — pll_player_stats
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Champ Series stats for the default year pll_player_stats()  # Regular season stats for 2024 pll_player_stats(year = 2024, season_segment = "regular") } # }

title: Get PLL Standings — pll_standings
text: Retrieves team standings given PLL season year segment. Returns one row per team win/loss records, score totals, conference breakdown.

title: Get PLL Standings — pll_standings
code: pll_standings(year = 2025, champ_series = TRUE)

title: Get PLL Standings — pll_standings
text: year Integer. Season year. Default 2025. Season data     available years season started completed. champ_series Logical. TRUE (default), returns Champ Series     standings. FALSE, returns regular season standings.

title: Get PLL Standings — pll_standings
text: tibble one row per team 19 snake_case columns: team_id Character. Unique team identifier. full_name Character. Full team name (e.g., "Atlas LC"). location Character. Team city/location name. location_code Character. Short location code. url_logo Character. URL team logo image. seed Integer. Team seed standings. wins Integer. Total wins. losses Integer. Total losses. ties Integer. Total ties. scores Integer. Total goals scored. scores_against Integer. Total goals allowed. score_diff Integer. Goal differential (scores - scores_against). conference_wins Integer. Conference wins. conference_losses Integer. Conference losses. conference_ties Integer. Conference ties. conference_scores Integer. Goals scored conference games. conference_scores_against Integer. Goals allowed conference games. conference Character. Conference name. conference_seed Integer. Seed within team's conference.

title: Get PLL Standings — pll_standings
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Champ Series standings for the current default year pll_standings()  # Regular season standings for 2024 pll_standings(year = 2024, champ_series = FALSE) } # }
